title: senna bacillaris var. bacillaris
intro: Senna bacillaris var. bacillaris, also known as the black stick or black cassia, is a plant species in the legume family, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Senna bacillaris var. bacillaris include its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and laxative properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, reduce inflammation, and eliminate parasitic worms, making it a valuable remedy for digestive and parasitic problems. Senna bacillaris var. bacillaris can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and is often used in traditional African medicine and herbalism.
